text: A street scene in an urban area, likely India, featuring a wide road, multi-story buildings, and large trees. A person is riding a bicycle on the left. The center of the image shows a construction or renovation site enclosed by a blue metal fence. A large tree trunk is visible near the center. A sign in Hindi is partially visible, reading 'नवा दुकान केन्द्र' (New Shop Center).
